props.heading: Build your website by talking to it.
props.subheading: AIncient is a chat-driven Drupal distribution. Describe what you want — a brand, a landing page, a blog post — and an AI operator composes it live, on a foundation you fully own.

props.heading: An operator console, not an admin maze
props.subheading: Three studios, one conversation. The AI proposes; you approve and publish.

features.title: Chat-driven
features.body: Create, find, and edit content by talking to an AI operator — no admin forms to hunt through.

features.title: Brand studio
features.body: Set your colours, type, and tone once. Every component reskins from your design tokens, live.

features.title: Component library
features.body: Heroes, features, pricing, FAQs, galleries and more — composed into pages that always respect your brand.

props.heading: Describe it. Watch it build.
props.body: Open the page studio, say what the page is for, and the agent composes it section by section in a live preview. Reorder, refine, and publish when it looks right — the structure is yours, the brand is applied automatically.

props.heading: One brand, every component.
props.body: Your design tokens flow through every page, the chrome, and even this site. Change a colour in the brand studio and the whole experience follows — with built-in WCAG contrast checks so it stays accessible.

props.heading: Designed once, branded everywhere.
props.subheading: Own your stack. No lock-in, no per-seat pricing — just Drupal with an AI operator on top.

questions.question: Do I need to know Drupal?
questions.answer: No. You talk to the operator console in plain language. Everything underneath is still standard Drupal, so a developer can take over any time.

questions.question: Is my site locked into AIncient?
questions.answer: Never. It's a GPL-licensed Drupal distribution — your content, config, and theme are all standard and portable.

questions.question: Can I bring my own brand?
questions.answer: Yes. Set your colours, fonts, and tone in the brand studio and every page and component reskins from your tokens.

props.heading: Ready to build your site?
props.subheading: Log in and compose your first branded page in minutes.
